revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Redirected page to [[Template:R from alternate spelling]]
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:R from alternate spelling]]

revision.comment: Robot: Fixing double redirect to [[Template:R from alternative spelling]]
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:R from alternative spelling]]
#REDIRECT [[Template:R from alternative spelling]] {{R from other template|R from alternative spelling}}

revision.comment: moved [[Template:R from alternate spacing]] to [[Template:R from alternative spacing]]: grammar

revision.text:
#REDIRECT [[Template:R from alternative spelling]] {{R to redirect template}}
[[Category:Redirect templates|Spacing]]

revision.comment: add cat
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:R from alternative spelling]] {{R to redirect template}}<noinclude> [[Category:Redirect templates|Spacing]] [[Category:Redirects to redirect templates|Spacing]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: rm repeated category
revision.text:
#REDIRECT [[Template:R from alternative spelling]] {{R to redirect template}}<noinclude>
[[Category:Redirect templates|Spacing]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Redirected page to [[Template:R from modification]]
This is a redirect to a redirect template, not the template itself.
adjust [[WP:RCAT|rcat]]s
revision.text:
#REDIRECT [[Template:R from modification]]
{{Redr|rtrt|tsh}}

revision.comment: /* top */{{redr}} is deprecated - converting to {{Redirect category shell|}} using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]

Retarget to more specific template. And this is not a shortcut, it's a sub-categorization. Also removing from this whole series of template redirs any pointless PoV-pushing about the Americanism "alternate", and any other inappropraite rcat labels (e.g. ones intended for article categoriztation).
Added redirect category

Protected "[[Template:R from alternative spacing]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 501 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))

Changed protection settings for "[[Template:R from alternative spacing]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 2707 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))
Create template
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from alternative spacing
  |name=From a different spacing
  |from=a title with a different spacing of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''|the target name}}
  |info=Pages that link to this redirect may be updated to link directly to the target page ''if that results in an improvement of the text''.  Do not "fix" such links if they are [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not broken]]. Also, these links [[MOS:NOPIPE|should not be replaced]] with [[WP:piped link|piped link]]s.
  |all category=Redirects from alternative spacings
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: different --> alternative
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from alternative spacing
  |name=From an alternative spacing
  |from=a title with an alternative spacing of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''|the target name}}
  |info=Pages that link to this redirect may be updated to link directly to the target page ''if that results in an improvement of the text''.  Do not "fix" such links if they are [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not broken]]. Also, these links [[MOS:NOPIPE|should not be replaced]] with [[WP:piped link|piped link]]s.
  |all category=Redirects from alternative spacings
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: implement linking to first parameter
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from alternative spacing
  |name=From an alternative spacing
  |from=a title with an alternative spacing of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}}
  |info=Pages that link to this redirect may be updated to link directly to the target page ''if that results in an improvement of the text''.  Do not "fix" such links if they are [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not broken]]. Also, these links [[MOS:NOPIPE|should not be replaced]] with [[WP:piped link|piped link]]s.
  |all category=Redirects from alternative spacings
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 22 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:R_from_alternative_spacing]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from alternative spacing
  |name=From an alternative spacing
  |from=a title with an alternative spacing of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}}
  |info=Pages that link to this redirect may be updated to link directly to the target page ''if that results in an improvement of the text''.  Do not "fix" such links if they are [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not broken]]. Also, these links [[MOS:NOPIPE|should not be replaced]] with [[WP:piped link|piped link]]s.
  |all category=Redirects from alternative spacings
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from alternative spacing
  |name=From an alternative spacing
  |from=a title with an alternative spacing of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}}
  |info=Pages that link to this redirect may be updated to link directly to the target page ''if that results in an improvement of the text''.  Do not "fix" such links if they are [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not broken]]. Also, these links [[MOS:NOPIPE|should not be replaced]] with [[WP:piped link|piped link]]s.
  |all category=Redirects from alternative spacings
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia7]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

  |id=R from alternative spacing
  |name=From an alternative spacing

  |info=Pages that link to this redirect may be updated to link directly to the target page ''if that results in an improvement of the text''.  Do not "fix" such links if they are [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not broken]]. Also, these links [[MOS:NOPIPE|should not be replaced]] with [[WP:piped link|piped link]]s.

  |info=Pages that link to this redirect may be updated to link directly to the target page ''if that results in an improvement of the text''. <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}

  |id=R from alternative spacing
  |name=From an alternative spacing
  |from=a title with an alternative spacing of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}}

}}<noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

  |id=R from alternative spacing

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from alternative spacing |name=From an alternative spacing |from=a title with an alternative spacing of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}} |info=Pages that link to this redirect may be updated to link directly to the target page ''if that results in an improvement of the text''. Do not "fix" such links if they are [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not broken]]. Also, these links [[:en:MOS:NOPIPE|should not be replaced]] with [[WP:piped link|piped link]]s. |all category=Redirects from alternative spacings }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from alternative spacing |name=From an alternative spacing |from=a title with an alternative spacing of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}} |info=Pages that link to this redirect may be updated to link directly to the target page ''if that results in an improvement of the text''. Do not "fix" such links if they are [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not broken]]. Also, these links [[:en:MOS:NOPIPE|should not be replaced]] with [[WP:piped link|piped link]]s. |all category=Redirects from alternative spacings }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from alternative spacing |name=From an alternative spacing |from=a title with an alternative spacing of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}} |info=Pages that link to this redirect may be updated to link directly to the target page ''if that results in an improvement of the text''. Do not "fix" such links if they are [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not broken]]. Also, these links [[:en:MOS:NOPIPE|should not be replaced]] with [[WP:piped link|piped link]]s. |all category=Redirects from alternative spacings }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from alternative spacing |name=From an alternative spacing |from=a title with an alternative spacing of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}} |info=Pages that link to this redirect may be updated to link directly to the target page ''if that results in an improvement of the text''. Do not "fix" such links if they are [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not broken]]. Also, these links [[:en:MOS:NOPIPE|should not be replaced]] with [[WP:piped link|piped link]]s. |all category=Redirects from alternative spacings }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
